entries.parsedImagePrompt: Over-the-shoulder full shot, camera angle from behind, static frame. Two distinct figures hurry away together, sharing a single light blue umbrella as their silhouettes vanish into the white curtain of rain. In the center of the frame, the backs of a cat young woman and a dog young man lean forward into the stormy downpour. The café awning covers the sidewalk in the foreground, with shallow puddles reflecting the dim ambient light; to the left stands the café entrance, to the right a support pillar, and beyond them the heavy street rain creates a dense blue-and-white blur. Backlit scene with low contrast silhouette effect, deep depth of field at T8.0 focusing on the figures and the rain, cool desaturated color tone with heavy blue rainy atmosphere. Artwork in cgstyle_9b, ultimate CG texture with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, transparent and deep imagery, high-detail skin surface, cinematic render quality, 2.5D semi-realistic style.
entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene] The scene is a static café awning on a rainy sidewalk. Shallow puddles reflect dim blue light in the foreground. The café entrance is on the left, a support pillar on the right. Beyond the awning, a heavy white curtain of rain falls, obscuring the street.
[Characters] Cat young woman and dog young man: full body silhouettes seen from behind, sharing a single light blue umbrella, walking away from the camera into the rain. Their faces are not visible.

Shot 1 (Over-the-Shoulder Full Shot, 2s): Static camera, environment remains unchanged.
Action: In slow motion, the two silhouettes continue their hurried walk, their figures shrinking as they move deeper into the white curtain of rain. The umbrella gently tilts against the falling rain, and their footsteps softly splash in the puddles. Smooth and fluid motion throughout.
